title: Magnificently Crispy American Chicken Tagine
description: A bitter and chewy American dish featuring sumac, agemono-deep-fry, and high protein, perfect for a date night, cooked in a traditional tajine clay vessel.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sumac, paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper.
Pour buttermilk into a separate large bowl.
Add chicken pieces to the buttermilk and let it marinate for 30 minutes.
Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees.
Remove chicken from buttermilk, allowing excess to drip off.
Dredge chicken pieces in the flour mixture, shaking off excess.
Carefully add chicken to the hot oil and fry until golden brown and crispy, about 5-7 minutes.
Using a slotted spoon, remove chicken from oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Add fried chicken to a preheated tajine clay vessel and cook over low heat for 10 minutes, covered.
